category_sources: source_facts.description identifies GNU Guile as the GNU Ubiquitous Intelligent Language for Extensions; official GNU Guile site describes it as GNU's programming and extension language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands Guile as GNU Ubiquitous Intelligent Language for Extensions; official GNU site presents the project as GNU Guile.
docs_sources: Official GNU Guile manual page provides the reference manual for Guile.
repo_sources: Official GNU/Savannah source-control location for the Guile project; source_facts.repo is empty so repo was enriched.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Guile as GNU's extension language; source_facts.executables lists command-line Guile tools.
